text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But I did place, so I managed to run a good race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That means my skills are improving! Right,
Trainer?
choice_data_list:
It's proof that your efforts each day are paying
off!

It's proof that your efforts each day are paying
off!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Only because you've been guiding me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But I've still got room for improvement. I can't be
resting on my laurels!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm brimming with energy right now! I'll keep up
the hard work!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah... I guess you feel the same way too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've got my eyes on being the top Umamusume in
all of Japan... I can't be satisfied with what I've
already achieved.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! I'll give it everything I've got from here
on out! Wooo!
